hooks.command: cat >/dev/null || true; git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && CRG_TOOLS=find_definition,find_callers,get_file_context,get_impact_radius,get_community_summary,search_graph,get_architecture_overview,traverse_graph /home/kevin/koeti-mvp-factory/.venv/bin/code-review-graph update --skip-flows --repo "/home/kevin/koeti-mvp-factory" || true

cat >/dev/null || true; git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && /home/kevin/koeti-mvp-factory/.venv/bin/code-review-graph status --repo "/home/kevin/koeti-mvp-factory" || echo 'Not a git repo, skipping'
